findings.title: 900 Sangoma FreePBX Instances Infected With Web Shells
findings.summary: 900+ FreePBX instances compromised with web shells via post-auth command injection in endpoint manager; active mass exploitation of internet-facing PBX infrastructure.

findings.title: Juniper PTX — CVE-2026-21902 Assigned, Out-of-Band Patch
findings.affected_technology: Juniper Networks Junos OS Evolved (PTX Series)
findings.summary: Critical PTX RCE now has CVE-2026-21902; Juniper released emergency out-of-band patch for Junos OS Evolved.

findings.title: Claude Code Vulnerabilities Exposed Developers to Silent Hacking
findings.summary: Malicious configuration files could trigger arbitrary code execution when opened with Claude Code; patched by Anthropic after Check Point disclosure.

findings.title: Aeternum Botnet — Polygon Blockchain C2 for Takedown Resilience
findings.summary: New botnet uses Polygon blockchain smart contracts for C2, making infrastructure nearly impossible to disrupt via traditional takedown methods.

noted.summary: CISA advisory on 4 vulnerabilities in IoT garden systems.
Trump orders federal agencies to phase out Anthropic technology.
iPhone and iPad cleared for classified NATO use.
Operator extradited to US for trafficking 26,000+ cards.
